nodes.body: This test doesn't assert anything about the production runner-selection hash computation: it only checks that `u64::to_le_bytes()` is 8 bytes and that hashing the same bytes twice is deterministic (which is always true). To make this catch regressions, consider asserting an expected SHA256 output for a fixed `(workflow_name, trigger_hash, job_id, step_index)` tuple, or (at minimum) on 32-bit targets compare the u64-based hash to a usize-based hash and assert they differ.
